(a) In this section, “retired peace officer” means a person who was formerly employed as a peace officer, as defined by Section 1.07 (Definitions) , Penal Code.

(b) The department shall design and issue specialty license plates for retired peace officers.

(c) There is no fee for the issuance of the license plates.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 504. License Plates
##### § 504.5111 — Retired Peace Officers

(a) In this section, “retired peace officer” means a person who was formerly employed as a peace officer, as defined by Section 1.07 (Definitions) , Penal Code.

(b) The department shall design and issue specialty license plates for retired peace officers.

(c) There is no fee for the issuance of the license plates.

*Added by Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 511 (H.B.2754), Sec. 1, eff. September 1, 2023.*
